---
title: "9.1.Estimate_noise"
output: html_document
date: "2024-06-18"
---

Estimate noise levels across libraries

```{r}

library(CAGEfightR)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(rtracklayer)
library(GenomicFeatures)
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)

setwd("/Users/fxc326/Documents/")
source("CAGEfightR_extensions/utils.R")
source("CAGEfightR_extensions/noise.R")
setwd("/Users/fxc326/Documents/nucCAGE/9.Noise")

```


```{r}

files <- c("HepG2.poolSub" = "../1.CTSSs/poolSub.HepG2.CTSSs.rmSingletons.rds",
           "A549.poolSub" = "../1.CTSSs/poolSub.A549.CTSSs.rmSingletons.rds",
           "HCT116.poolSub" = "../1.CTSSs/poolSub.HCT116.CTSSs.rmSingletons.rds",
           "K562.poolSub" = "../1.CTSSs/poolSub.combined.k562.CTSSs.rmSingletons.rds",
           "K562.repSub" = "../1.CTSSs/repSub.combined.k562.CTSSs.rmSingletons.rds",
           "GM12878.repSub" = "../1.CTSSs/repSub.combined.GM12878.CTSSs.rmSingletons.rds",
           "GM12878.poolSub" = "../1.CTSSs/poolSub.combined.GM12878.CTSSs.rmSingletons.rds")

CTSSs <- readRDS(files[1])

## uniquely mappable
map.gr.plus <- import.bed("uniquely_mappable/tracks/GRCh38_no_alt_analysis_set_GCA_000001405.15.73/GRCh38_no_alt_analysis_set_GCA_000001405.15.73.uniquely.mappable.plus.bed")
map.gr.minus <- import.bed("uniquely_mappable/tracks/GRCh38_no_alt_analysis_set_GCA_000001405.15.73/GRCh38_no_alt_analysis_set_GCA_000001405.15.73.uniquely.mappable.minus.bed")

seqlevels(map.gr.plus,pruning.mode="coarse") <- seqlevels(CTSSs)
seqlevels(map.gr.minus,pruning.mode="coarse") <- seqlevels(CTSSs)
seqinfo(map.gr.plus) <- seqinfo(map.gr.minus) <- seqinfo(CTSSs)
map.gr.plus <- trim(map.gr.plus)
map.gr.minus <- trim(map.gr.minus)

## mask
blacklist <- import.bed("../0.External_resources/ENCFF356LFX.bed")
hotspots <- import.bed("../0.External_resources/hotspots_merged_ext_300.bed")
exons <- flank(unlist(exonsBy(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene,"tx")),50,both=TRUE)
mask <- reduce(c(blacklist,hotspots,exons))
seqlevels(mask,pruning.mode="coarse") <- seqlevels(CTSSs)
seqinfo(mask) <- seqinfo(CTSSs)
mask <- trim(mask)

for (n in names(files)) {
    CTSSs <- readRDS(files[n])
    divnoise <- estimateDivergentNoise(CTSSs, mask, map.gr.minus, map.gr.plus)
    divnoise
    write.csv(divnoise,paste0(n,".divnoise.csv"))
}

```
